base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_brinstar — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. Brinstar zone atlas — green/blue organic cavern walls, vines, alien growths, breakable blocks, Chozo-pedestal mount. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Brinstar zone atlas — green/blue organic cavern walls, vines, alien growths, breakable blocks, Chozo-pedestal mount; entry-zone of Zebes. Includes BREAKABLE and CHOZO labeled sub-blocks
